title: Front Office Manager - Cleartrip Hotels - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Cleartrip Hotels - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Cleartrip Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cleartrip Hotels:
Cleartrip Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
